name: pqs_atlas_score
description: PQS AtlasRow for any prompt. Runs PQS pre-flight score (pre_score.total 0-80, grade A-F) + post-flight score + Opus 4.7 output, returned as a structured AtlasRow JSON. Buyers can grade-gate payment on pre_score.total >= 60 (B+).

prompt.description: The prompt to score and execute. Min 8, max 8000 chars.

vertical.description: Optional vertical hint. One of the VALID_VERTICALS. Default: general.
